title: Street Fighter 6/Version/2.0301 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 2.0301 Game Version 2.0301 date May 28, 2026 Summary Ingrid Release. Minor system changes and bug fixes. Links Patch Notes Ingrid Patch Ingrid released Universal Changes Wakeup Drive Reversal When the invincible startup interacts with an opponent's Throw hitbox, a 12f screen freeze now occurs and refunds 1 Drive bar on hit This does not prevent Burnout from occurring before the meter is gained, but it makes Drive Reversal a more cost-effective defensive tool against throw loops As an unintended consequence, the screen freeze affects Kimberly's spraycan setups, causing the opponent's Wakeup Drive Reversal to be punishable if she attempts a throw Punish Counter Throws The opponent no longer gains double the usual amount of Super Gauge (no change to attacker's meter gain) This makes Punish Counter Throws a more desirable option to finish a round while building meter without also benefiting the opponent Throw Escapes Defender's Drive Gain reduced 10000 → 5000 Defender's Super Gain reduced 1000 → 0 Super Projectile Clashes Changed the behavior of clashing multi-hit projectile Supers to ensure consistent results Super Art Command Inputs Fixed issue where holding a specific direction would cause some Supers not to be performed Affected Supers: Akuma SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) C. Viper SA1 (Modern + Manual, while holding Down or Back) Chun-Li SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) Ed SA3 (Classic, while holding Back) Mai SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) Ryu SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up or Down) Character Changes Alex Assist Combo 2 Fixed issue where input buffer would be disabled after the 2nd hit was blocked when attempting to use another Assist Combo 2 Input buffer for the 2nd hit shifted from frame 2 → 7 Twisted Drop (Modern Controls: 2L~2H) Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button Palm Strikes (Modern Controls: 5M~M) Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button Dangerous Armbar (Modern Controls: 2MH~2LM) Fixed issue where immediate scaling was unintentionally applied when using the Throw button instead of LM Hyper Takedown (2PP~2LPLK) 20% Immediate scaling added to match other normal throws C. Viper Assist Combo 3 Fixed issue where the input buffer for the 2nd attack was faster than expected during the 1st hit Chun-Li Snake Strike (Modern Controls: 214X~5M) Fixed issue where the Punish Counter state was extended by 1 frame when holding Up after being Perfect Parries Dhalsim Aerial Yoga Teleport Forward (j.6PPP) Fixed issue where Dhalsim could appear behind the opponent facing the wrong direction if both players were cornered Ed Low Smash Combination (2HK~HP) Startup of 2nd hit reduced 12 → 10 Total animation decreased 35 → 33 This causes the Target Combo to always be a true blockstring even when delayed (can no longer frame trap the opponent's attempted 2HK punish) OD Psycho Shoot (236PP~6P) Fixed issue where the projectile clash from OD Psycho Spark could remain after shooting the projectile Elena Starling Beak (Modern Controls: 5M~M) Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button Guile OD Sonic Blade (214PP) Fixed issue where the L+M and M+H versions would not come out with a negative edge (button release) input Jamie Full Moon Kick (6MK~MK) Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit This makes it easier for the 2nd attack to connect at more ranges (after the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads) Reduced pushback on hit/block for the 2nd attack to pull the opponent closer to Jamie JP SA3 (236236K) Fixed issue where the attack could whiff through opponents that were moving forward quickly Juri Senkai Kick (6MK) Increased pushback on block to ensure Juri is always out of throw range after DR~6MK Kimberly SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where it was difficult to Back Rise after being hit by the 0-can version Mai Hien Ren Kyaku (Modern Controls: 5L~L~L) Fixed issue where 2nd/3rd attacks would not be performed while holding the Assist button Hoshi Kujaku (Modern Controls: 4H~H) Fixed issue where 2nd attack would not be performed while holding the Assist button Marisa Malleus Breaker (3HP~3HP) Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit (and expanded the hurtbox to match this new range) This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked 3HP as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads Sagat OD Low Tiger Shot (236LPMP or 236LPHP) Fixed issue where inputting 236LPMP while holding down the HP button would result in a MP High Tiger Shot

lists.text: Ingrid released

items.text: Ingrid released
items.html: Ingrid released

lists.text: Wakeup Drive Reversal When the invincible startup interacts with an opponent's Throw hitbox, a 12f screen freeze now occurs and refunds 1 Drive bar on hit This does not prevent Burnout from occurring before the meter is gained, but it makes Drive Reversal a more cost-effective defensive tool against throw loops As an unintended consequence, the screen freeze affects Kimberly's spraycan setups, causing the opponent's Wakeup Drive Reversal to be punishable if she attempts a throw Punish Counter Throws The opponent no longer gains double the usual amount of Super Gauge (no change to attacker's meter gain) This makes Punish Counter Throws a more desirable option to finish a round while building meter without also benefiting the opponent Throw Escapes Defender's Drive Gain reduced 10000 → 5000 Defender's Super Gain reduced 1000 → 0 Super Projectile Clashes Changed the behavior of clashing multi-hit projectile Supers to ensure consistent results Super Art Command Inputs Fixed issue where holding a specific direction would cause some Supers not to be performed Affected Supers: Akuma SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) C. Viper SA1 (Modern + Manual, while holding Down or Back) Chun-Li SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) Ed SA3 (Classic, while holding Back) Mai SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) Ryu SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up or Down)

items.text: Wakeup Drive Reversal When the invincible startup interacts with an opponent's Throw hitbox, a 12f screen freeze now occurs and refunds 1 Drive bar on hit This does not prevent Burnout from occurring before the meter is gained, but it makes Drive Reversal a more cost-effective defensive tool against throw loops As an unintended consequence, the screen freeze affects Kimberly's spraycan setups, causing the opponent's Wakeup Drive Reversal to be punishable if she attempts a throw
items.html:
Wakeup Drive Reversal
  • When the invincible startup interacts with an opponent's Throw hitbox, a 12f screen freeze now occurs and refunds 1 Drive bar on hit
  • This does not prevent Burnout from occurring before the meter is gained, but it makes Drive Reversal a more cost-effective defensive tool against throw loops
  • As an unintended consequence, the screen freeze affects Kimberly's spraycan setups, causing the opponent's Wakeup Drive Reversal to be punishable if she attempts a throw

items.text: Punish Counter Throws The opponent no longer gains double the usual amount of Super Gauge (no change to attacker's meter gain) This makes Punish Counter Throws a more desirable option to finish a round while building meter without also benefiting the opponent
items.html:
Punish Counter Throws
  • The opponent no longer gains double the usual amount of Super Gauge (no change to attacker's meter gain)
  • This makes Punish Counter Throws a more desirable option to finish a round while building meter without also benefiting the opponent

items.text: Throw Escapes Defender's Drive Gain reduced 10000 → 5000 Defender's Super Gain reduced 1000 → 0
items.html:
Throw Escapes
  • Defender's Drive Gain reduced 10000 → 5000
  • Defender's Super Gain reduced 1000 → 0

items.text: Super Projectile Clashes Changed the behavior of clashing multi-hit projectile Supers to ensure consistent results
items.html:
Super Projectile Clashes
  • Changed the behavior of clashing multi-hit projectile Supers to ensure consistent results

items.text: Super Art Command Inputs Fixed issue where holding a specific direction would cause some Supers not to be performed Affected Supers: Akuma SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) C. Viper SA1 (Modern + Manual, while holding Down or Back) Chun-Li SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) Ed SA3 (Classic, while holding Back) Mai SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up) Ryu SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up or Down)
items.html:
Super Art Command Inputs
  • Fixed issue where holding a specific direction would cause some Supers not to be performed
  • Affected Supers:
    • Akuma SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up)
    • C. Viper SA1 (Modern + Manual, while holding Down or Back)
    • Chun-Li SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up)
    • Ed SA3 (Classic, while holding Back)
    • Mai SA1/SA2/SA3 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up)
    • Ryu SA2 (Modern + Manual, while holding Up or Down)

lists.text: Low Smash Combination (2HK~HP) Startup of 2nd hit reduced 12 → 10 Total animation decreased 35 → 33 This causes the Target Combo to always be a true blockstring even when delayed (can no longer frame trap the opponent's attempted 2HK punish) OD Psycho Shoot (236PP~6P) Fixed issue where the projectile clash from OD Psycho Spark could remain after shooting the projectile

items.text: Low Smash Combination (2HK~HP) Startup of 2nd hit reduced 12 → 10 Total animation decreased 35 → 33 This causes the Target Combo to always be a true blockstring even when delayed (can no longer frame trap the opponent's attempted 2HK punish)
items.html:
Low Smash Combination (2HK~HP)
  • Startup of 2nd hit reduced 12 → 10
  • Total animation decreased 35 → 33
  • This causes the Target Combo to always be a true blockstring even when delayed (can no longer frame trap the opponent's attempted 2HK punish)

lists.text: Full Moon Kick (6MK~MK) Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit This makes it easier for the 2nd attack to connect at more ranges (after the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads) Reduced pushback on hit/block for the 2nd attack to pull the opponent closer to Jamie

items.text: Full Moon Kick (6MK~MK) Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit This makes it easier for the 2nd attack to connect at more ranges (after the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads) Reduced pushback on hit/block for the 2nd attack to pull the opponent closer to Jamie
items.html:
Full Moon Kick (6MK~MK)
  • Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit
    • This makes it easier for the 2nd attack to connect at more ranges (after the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads)
  • Reduced pushback on hit/block for the 2nd attack to pull the opponent closer to Jamie

lists.text: Malleus Breaker (3HP~3HP) Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit (and expanded the hurtbox to match this new range) This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked 3HP as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads

items.text: Malleus Breaker (3HP~3HP) Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit (and expanded the hurtbox to match this new range) This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked 3HP as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads
items.html:
Malleus Breaker (3HP~3HP)
  • Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit (and expanded the hurtbox to match this new range)
  • This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked 3HP as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads

items.html: Increased forward movement and expanded the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox of the 2nd hit (and expanded the hurtbox to match this new range)

items.text: This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked 3HP as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads
items.html: This fixes the unintended issue where the 2nd hit would whiff after a blocked 3HP as a result of the patch that increased the pushback of blocked overheads

lists.text: OD Low Tiger Shot (236LPMP or 236LPHP) Fixed issue where inputting 236LPMP while holding down the HP button would result in a MP High Tiger Shot
